# Here are 4 comment lines for an llms.txt file:
# Finni AI Finance Tracker helps users manage finances via chat.
# Assistants can expect to track expenses and provide insights.
# Finni offers personalized budget recommendations and goal tracking.

# Primary: https://www.heyfinni.com
# Tag script: https://shop.daamdekhi.com/aeo/tag.js
